title: Simple Warps
body:
This plugin allows you to create warps and set a join warp. 
You can choose in the config if you want to tp the player to the jointpwarp defined in the config file. 
<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>

/warp create <name> - Create a new warp.

/warp delete <name> - Delete a warp.

/warp list - List all warps.

/warp <name> - Teleport to a warp.

/simplewarps reload - Reload the config file.

/simplewarps help - Display this help message.

</details>
